phrases.intent_en: Buy two seats for tonight's opera performance
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais acheter deux places pour le spectacle ce soir, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DRAY ash-TAY duh PLASS poor luh spek-TAKL suh SWAHR seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Grand Théâtre, built in 1780 by Victor Louis, was the model for the Paris Opéra Garnier.

responses.english: There are seats left in the orchestra.
responses.phonetic: eel REST day PLAHS ah lor-KESTR
responses.french: Il reste des places à l'orchestre.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours of the theatre are available
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des visites guidées du théâtre ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-keel-YAH day vee-ZEET ghee-DAY doo tay-AH-truh
phrases.cultural_note: Guided tours of the Grand Théâtre are available and include the main auditorium, foyer, and grand staircase.

responses.phonetic: wee, too lay ZHOOR ah kah-TORZ UHR
responses.french: Oui, tous les jours à quatorze heures.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to collect pre-booked tickets
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je retirer mes billets réservés à l'avance ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh ruh-tee-RAY may bee-YAY ray-zair-VAY ah lah-VAHNS
phrases.cultural_note: The box office is on the ground floor; arrive early as queues can form before curtain time.

responses.english: At the box office, with your reference.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a dress code for the evening performance
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un code vestimentaire pour la représentation ce soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL un kod ves-tee-mahn-TAIR poor lah ruh-pray-zahn-TAH-SYON suh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Smart dress is expected at the Grand Théâtre, though strict formal wear is not always required.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a programme for the current season
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me donner le programme de la saison en cours ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh doh-NAY luh proh-GRAM duh lah say-ZOHN ahn KOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The Opéra National de Bordeaux presents opera, ballet, and orchestral concerts throughout the season.

responses.phonetic: vwah-SEE luh proh-GRAM duh lah seh-ZOHN
responses.french: Voici le programme de la saison.
